title: The Briefing: Financial Services
summary: Anthropic hosted a virtual event called The Briefing: Financial Services where leaders from major banks discussed their deployments of Claude across their organizations. The event showcased practical applications of Claude in financial services.
writeup: This video documents The Briefing: Financial Services, a virtual event hosted by Anthropic where leaders from major banks discuss their deployments of Claude across their organizations. The session centers on practical applications of the model within financial services rather than abstract capabilities. The takeaway is a view into how enterprises in a heavily regulated sector are putting an LLM into operational use.
